contract.name: contract
contract.summary: Meta-feature owning all cross-feature templates, schemas, dispatch scripts, and enforcement checks (hard-rules R1-R9, naming-convention).

policy.name: policy
policy.summary: Canonical rule files fed to subagents; four policy docs (philosophy, spec-rules, coding-rules, workflow-rules).

rabbit-backlog.name: rabbit-backlog
rabbit-backlog.summary: Owns backlog item filing and lifecycle for all rabbit features. Provides file-backlog-item.sh, backlog-item-status.sh, and list-backlog.sh.

rabbit-bug.name: rabbit-bug
rabbit-bug.summary: Owns bug filing, tracking, and lifecycle for all rabbit features. Provides file-bug.sh, bug-status.sh, and list-bugs.sh.

rabbit-cage.name: rabbit-cage
rabbit-cage.summary: Owns the entire Claude Code surface and all user-facing capabilities: hooks, commands, skills for scaffolding, project management, and installation. Bug-filing and backlog management are now owned by rabbit-bug and rabbit-backlog respectively.

tdd-state-machine.name: tdd-state-machine
tdd-state-machine.summary: Hardens TDD discipline by defining tdd_state transitions, drift detection, and the context block for spawned subagents. Owns the rabbit-feature-touch skill that enforces full TDD discipline on every feature touch.
